title: Restructure AI bootstrap templates to core/wrapper + add protected-tokens CI lint
description: 将 6 个 bootstrap 文件重构为 core (英文硬规则不翻) + wrapper (中文解释层) 结构, 将 templates/claude-skills/agents-md-init/SKILL.md 的 frontmatter + hard rules 改为英文. 新建 packages/shared/src/i18n/protected-tokens.ts 列出受保护 token (MUST/NEVER/MCP tool 名/JSON key/file path). 新建 scripts/lint-protected-tokens.ts 并集成到 CI. 研究证实英文硬规则比中文提升 +10-15% AI 代码质量.

files.change: Restructure: Section 1 'CORE RULES' in English (hard rules, MUST/NEVER statements); Section 2 '使用说明 / Explanation' in Chinese (context, rationale)
Same core/wrapper restructure as CLAUDE.md — core rules in English, explanation in Chinese
frontmatter fields in English; Phase 1-3 interview prompts may remain Chinese; hard rules section (MUST/NEVER) in English
Export PROTECTED_TOKENS array of strings: MCP tool names (fab_*, fabric_*), JSON keys (ledger_entry, agent_meta), file paths (AGENTS.md, FABRIC.md), MUST/NEVER keywords
Script that reads templates/bootstrap/* and templates/claude-skills/**, checks that protected tokens are not translated/modified in core sections; exit 1 on violation

implementation: Read all 6 bootstrap files to understand current structure and identify which sections contain hard rules vs explanations
Define the core/wrapper structure: '## CORE RULES (DO NOT TRANSLATE)' section in English followed by '## 使用说明' section in Chinese
Refactor templates/bootstrap/CLAUDE.md: extract MUST/NEVER/hard rules to core section in English; add Chinese wrapper explaining context
Apply same pattern to remaining 5 bootstrap files (GEMINI.md, cursor-fabric-bootstrap.mdc, roo-fabric.md, windsurf-fabric.md, codex-AGENTS-header.md)
Update templates/claude-skills/agents-md-init/SKILL.md: convert frontmatter to English; keep Phase 1-3 interview content in Chinese; English MUST/NEVER rules
Create packages/shared/src/i18n/protected-tokens.ts: import from existing knowledge, list MCP tool names (fab_read_ledger, fab_write_ledger etc.), JSON keys, critical file paths
Create scripts/lint-protected-tokens.ts: read bootstrap files, verify core sections contain protected tokens untranslated, exit 1 with violation report if found
Test lint script locally: npx ts-node scripts/lint-protected-tokens.ts
Verify: core sections of all 6 bootstrap files contain English hard rules

reference.pattern: AI prompt engineering: English hard rules + native language explanation wrapper
reference.examples: Core section: '## CORE RULES\nMUST: Always write AGENTS.md in English.\nNEVER: Translate ledger_entry JSON keys.'

criteria: All 6 bootstrap files contain a section with header matching 'CORE RULES' (English)
All 6 bootstrap files contain a Chinese explanation section
SKILL.md frontmatter fields are in English
packages/shared/src/i18n/protected-tokens.ts exists and exports PROTECTED_TOKENS array with >= 10 items
scripts/lint-protected-tokens.ts exists and runs without error on current templates
npx ts-node scripts/lint-protected-tokens.ts exits 0 on compliant files
convergence.definition_of_done: 6 个 bootstrap 文件完成 core/wrapper 重构, SKILL.md 硬规则英文化, protected-tokens lint 脚本可在 CI 中执行

rationale.chosen_approach: Section-based core/wrapper 而不是分拆为两个文件 — 保持模板单文件方便 fab init 复制安装
alternatives_considered: 分拆为 CLAUDE-core.md + CLAUDE-wrapper.md 两文件
仅在注释中标注 DO NOT TRANSLATE
decision_factors: locked decision: AI prompt 策略 = core (英文硬规则) + wrapper (中文解释)
中文解释对中国开发者降低使用门槛
rationale.tradeoffs: 单文件 core/wrapper 结构需要 lint 脚本来防止 AI 翻译 core section

risks.description: AI 工具在处理混合语言文件时可能忽视 core/wrapper 边界
risks.mitigation: 在 core section header 加 'DO NOT TRANSLATE' 标记; protected-tokens lint 作为 CI 守卫
risks.fallback: 分拆为双文件, 安装时合并

commit.message_template: refactor(templates): core/wrapper bootstrap structure + protected-tokens lint
